dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I have had a bad cough for four days. It is hard to breathe when I move.
Can you describe the character of this cough—is it dry or productive—and how would you rate the severity of your shortness of breath on a scale of 1 to 10?
The cough is not dry. It brings up yellow and green stuff. My breathing is maybe a 5.
Do you have any known allergies to medications, foods, or environmental factors?
I remember I cannot take penicillin. It gives me a rash. I do not know about other things.
[DDX] (Pneumonia; Acute exacerbation of COPD; Congestive heart failure; Pulmonary embolism; Bronchitis)
